fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Last Ready State
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the job queue entry was last set to Ready and sent to the job queue.

fields.name: Expiration Date/Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the job queue entry is to expire, after which the job queue entry will not be run.  The format for the date and time must be month/day/year hour:minute, and then AM or PM. For example, 3/10/2021 12:00 AM.

fields.name: Earliest Start Date/Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the earliest date and time when the job queue entry should be run.

fields.name: Object Type to Run
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the object, report or codeunit, that is to be run for the job queue entry. After you specify a type, you then select an object ID of that type in the Object ID to Run field.

fields.name: Object ID to Run
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the object that is to be run for this job. You can select an ID that is of the object type that you have specified in the Object Type to Run field.

fields.name: Object Caption to Run
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the object that is selected in the Object ID to Run field.

fields.name: Report Output Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the output of the scheduled report.

fields.name: Maximum No. of Attempts to Run
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times a job queue task should be rerun after a job queue fails to run. This is useful for situations in which a task might be unresponsive. For example, a task might be unresponsive because it depends on an external resource that is not always available.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the job queue entry. When you create a job queue entry, its status is set to On Hold. You can set the status to Ready and back to On Hold. Otherwise, status information in this field is updated automatically.

fields.name: Parameter String
fields.tooltip: Specifies a text string that is used as a parameter by the job queue when it is run.

fields.name: Recurring Job
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the job queue entry is recurring. If the Recurring Job check box is selected, then the job queue entry is recurring. If the check box is cleared, the job queue entry is not recurring. After you specify that a job queue entry is a recurring one, you must specify on which days of the week the job queue entry is to run. Optionally, you can also specify a time of day for the job to run and how many minutes should elapse between runs.

fields.name: No. of Minutes between Runs
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum number of minutes that are to elapse between runs of a job queue entry. This field only has meaning if the job queue entry is set to be a recurring job.

fields.name: Run on Mondays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the job queue entry runs on Mondays.

fields.name: Run on Tuesdays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the job queue entry runs on Tuesdays.

fields.name: Run on Wednesdays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the job queue entry runs on Wednesdays.

fields.name: Run on Thursdays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the job queue entry runs on Thursdays.

fields.name: Run on Fridays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the job queue entry runs on Fridays.

fields.name: Run on Saturdays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the job queue entry runs on Saturdays.

fields.name: Run on Sundays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the job queue entry runs on Sundays.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the earliest time of the day that the recurring job queue entry is to be run.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the latest time of the day that the recurring job queue entry is to be run.

fields.name: Next Run Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date formula that is used to calculate the next time the recurring job queue entry will run. If you use a date formula, all other recurrence settings are cleared.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the job queue entry. You can edit and update the description on the job queue entry card. The description is also displayed in the Job Queue Entries window, but it cannot be updated there.

fields.name: Job Queue Category Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the job queue category to which the job queue entry belongs. Choose the field to select a code from the list.

fields.name: Error Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies the latest error message that was received from the job queue entry. You can view the error message if the Status field is set to Error. The field can contain up to 250 characters.

fields.name: User Session Started
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time that a user session started.

fields.name: Printer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the printer to use to print the scheduled report.

fields.name: Report Request Page Options
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether options on the report request page have been set for scheduled report job. If the check box is selected, then options have been set for the scheduled report.

fields.name: Rerun Delay (sec.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many seconds to wait before re-running this job queue task in the event of a failure.

fields.name: Scheduled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the job queue entry has been scheduled to run automatically, which happens when an entry changes status to Ready. If the field is cleared, the job queue entry is not scheduled to run.

fields.name: Inactivity Timeout Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of minutes that pass before a recurring job that has the status On Hold With Inactivity Timeout is automatically restated. The value cannot be less than five minutes.

fields.name: Job Timeout
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum time that the job queue entry is allowed to run.

fields.name: Priority Within Category
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the job within the job queue category. Only relevant when job queue category code is specified.
